subject: Fashion and Fabrics
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Haute Couture – High-end, custom-made designer clothing.
topics: Example: Bell-bottom jeans were trendy in the 1970s, but they disappeared for a while
activities: Chart paper, markers, sticky notes, Magazines, printed pictures, projector, Simple costume
Learners to watch videos depicting people in various outfits from different cultures and
People wear clothes for protection, modesty, identification, decoration, and status.
